query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unlinked,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM phone_numbers WHERE provider = 'Channel Haus';

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linked,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unlinked,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM phone_numbers WHERE provider = 'Channel Haus';
